nodes.prompt: Validate user input: subject, selected source IDs. Verify sources exist in Candlekeep. Trigger ingestion sync to RAG if needed.
Read past articles from past-articles/ folder. Analyze writing style and produce a Style Fingerprint.
Query Hybrid-Search-RAG with the article subject to deeply read selected sources and understand available material.
Based on retrieved source material, propose 2-3 thesis statements for the researcher to choose from.
Present thesis options to researcher. They pick, modify, or state their own.
Generate structured outline serving the thesis. Each section has title, argument role, suggested sources, word count.
Present outline to researcher. Back and forth until approved.
Sync selected Candlekeep documents to Hybrid-Search-RAG index.
Write all sections in parallel. Each section spawns sub-nodes: section_N/write_pN for each paragraph.
Audit every paragraph. Verify citations against RAG and Candlekeep. Reject ungrounded claims. Sub-nodes: section_N/audit_pN. Max 3 retries per paragraph.
Review full draft for argument coherence, transitions, style consistency. Make targeted revisions.
Generate .docx with proper footnotes, title, section headings, and bibliography.
